    "title": "GLES 2013: Online-Tracking of the German Federal Election Campaign",

    "time_coverage": "2013 federal election campaign",

    ],
    "unit_of_analysis": "Individuals",
    "data_collection_mode": "Online survey (non-probability online panel via LINK Internet Panel)"
  },
